name: Iida Marine
description: Iida is one of the two members of Off the Hook, a band featured in Splatoon 2. She hosts Inkopolis News along with Hime, replacing the Squid Sisters from the first game. Her signature color is teal.

name: Inui
description: A friendly co-worker Haida becomes friends with.

name: Izuna Kuda
description: Izuna is a 1st year student and member of the Ninjutsu Research Club of the Allied Hyakkiyako Academy, Izuna is a bright and bubbly girl who dreams of one day becoming "the best ninja of Kivotos". But to others, her goal seems like a pipe dream, resulting in her becoming a lone fox. In order to become a proper ninja, she continues to refer to Sensei as "lord" while "escorting" (simply chasing Sensei around Kivotos) and devoting herself to various other activities.

name: Jin Yuugami
description: Jin Yuugami is a prosecutor convicted for murder who was called to serve in court during the events of AA5. He is known for his use of psychological manipulation in court, as well as his pet hawk Taka, to intimidate others and bend them to his will. His conviction and tactics in court earned him the nickname of the "Twisted Samurai".

name: Jirou Mochizuki
description: An old blood vampire that sided with the humans to fight against the Kowloon children during the Kowloon Shock. Jirou was transformed into a vampire in 19th Century London. He used to be a lieutenant in the Imperial Japanese Navy until he was severely injured in a fight protecting Alice. Besides being an Old Blood, he also comes from a very special bloodline: the blood of the Sage. He wields a long katana which has a blade made of silver. name: Junpei
description: A hot-blooded youth, Junpei is determined to save others from the Nonary Game. He has the number "5" on his bracelet.

name: Kaiko Mikuniyama
description: The girl who is in charge of adapting Itsuki's light novel series, Mahou Gakuen, (Imouto no Subete in the novel) into a manga. She is highly talented and looks up to Itsuki, as she also has a little sister fetish. She has an underwear fetish as well, and even goes as far as to wear panties in the shape of a bow on her head. When writing, she takes off the panty bow and puts the panties on her face.

name: Kenzou Shimohara
description: Youngest of the 3 Guevara brothers

name: Klonoa
description: Klonoa, sometimes referred to as Klonoa of the Wind, is an anthropomorphic humanoid long-eared cat like creature who is the main protagonist in the Klonoa franchise. He was created by Namco and Klonoa Works, and has starred in his own series since 1997. Klonoa is known for being a determined, friendly and good-natured individual, often helping others and saving the various worlds he finds himself in from all sorts of trouble.

name: Kotomi Tsuda
description: Takatoshi's younger sister, who is a third year in junior high school and plans to attend Ōsai like her brother. She is considerate and caring toward others, but is curious and enthusiastic about adult matters, to the point of frequently behaving similarly to Shino Amakusa (to the point that both brought Takatoshi adult manga when he was sick).

name: Kubera
description: __Species:__ God __Zen:__ Fifth Zen __Jurisdiction:__ Nature __Source Attribute:__ Earth __Height:__ 196 cm (6'4" ft) __Weight:__ 86 kg (189 lbs) Kubera, usually referred to as God Kubera, is the god of Earth, who is renowned among humans for his wealth, and among the gods and suras for his highly apathetic nature. He is also the patron of the 10th month.

name: Libertà
description: **Height:** 173 cm **Weapon:** Cutlass **Stigmata:** Forehead A boy with a deep love for anything new or unusual. He feels that life aboard a ship suits him perfectly. He is the type to spring into action the moment he sets his mind on something; consequently, while he frequently stumbles, he just as often manages to pull through on sheer luck alone. He spares no effort for anyone with whom he intuitively feels he can forge a genuine bond.

name: Lu
description: She is the first mermaid to be shown in the film. She is closest to the protagonist Kai and can manipulate water and marine life. When she touches sunlight, she begins to burn and when she hears music, her fins turn into legs. ~!Gets captured with her father by Yuho’s father!~

name: Mabui
description: The Fourth Raikage's assistant acts as a go-between for the Raikage and Kumogakure's forces, giving them his orders and keeping him updated on their progress. She's a dark-skinned girl who is seen wearing a very formal attire during work hours, long earrings, and properly pulling her light-gray hair back into a bun except for the frontal part of it, which consists of two flat side bangs that fall along the sides of her face.
